[Fact]
public async Task SelectTargetFileAsync_WhenNoValidFileExists_ShouldReturnNullAndNotHandleFailure()
{
    // Arrange
    var notificationMock = new Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>();
    var service = CreateService(notificationMock);

    string[] files =
    {
        "folder/not-a-dia-file.txt",
        "folder/BDM_Westpac_ISA_Deaths_2020-01-01_2020-01-02.csv",
        "folder/BDM_Westpac_ISA_Deaths_2020-01-01_2020-01-02.txt"
    };

    // Act
    var result = await InvokeSelectTargetFileAsync(service, files);

    // Assert
    Assert.Null(result.SelectedFile);
    Assert.False(result.FailureHandled);

    notificationMock.Verify(
        service => service.NotifyFailureAsync(
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<Exception>(),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Never);
}
